about.termsIntro: Welcome to EduFrais. By using our application, you agree to these terms of service. Please read them carefully before using our services.
about.termsAcceptance: By accessing and using the EduFrais application, you agree to be bound by these terms of service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the application.
about.termsUse: EduFrais is a school fee management platform that enables parents to pay tuition fees, school directors to manage payments, and agents to facilitate transactions. You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.
about.termsAccounts: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. You agree to provide accurate and up-to-date information during registration. Any activity performed from your account is your responsibility.
about.termsPayments: All payments made through EduFrais are final and subject to the terms of the respective school. EduFrais acts as a payment intermediary and cannot be held responsible for disputes between parents and schools. Payment receipts are automatically generated and available in the app.
about.termsLiability: EduFrais provides the service "as is" without warranty of any kind. We are not responsible for service interruptions, data loss, or any indirect damages resulting from the use of the application.
about.termsModifications: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication in the application. By continuing to use the service after a modification, you accept the new terms.
about.privacyIntro: At EduFrais, protecting your personal data is a priority. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
about.privacyCollection: We collect the following information: first name, last name, phone number, email address, civil ID number, children's information (name, date of birth, grade level), payment data, and transaction history.
about.privacyUsage: Your data is used to: manage your account and verify your identity, process school fee payments, send payment and deadline notifications, improve our services and your user experience, and comply with our legal and regulatory obligations.
about.privacyStorage: Your data is stored on secure servers. Biometric credentials are encrypted locally on your device using the system's secure storage. We use SSL/TLS encryption for all communications and JWT authentication tokens to protect your sessions.
about.privacySharing: We never sell your personal data. Your information may be shared with: the schools your children are enrolled in, authorized agents who facilitate transactions, and competent authorities when required by law.
about.privacyRights: You have the right to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate information, request deletion of your account and data, and withdraw your consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us through the app or by email.
about.privacyContact: For any questions regarding your data protection, please contact us at: support@edufrais.com
about.helpIntro: Welcome to the EduFrais Help Center. Find answers to frequently asked questions and usage guides here.
about.helpGettingStarted: To get started, create your account by selecting your role (parent, director, agent, or manager). Fill in your personal information and phone number. Once registered, sign in and access your personalized dashboard.
about.helpPayments: To make a payment: go to the "Payments" tab, select the child and desired payment plan, then confirm the amount. You will receive a receipt once the payment is validated. You can view your payment history at any time.
about.helpNotifications: Enable push notifications in settings to receive payment reminders, transaction confirmations, and important updates from the school. Email notifications are also available.
about.helpFaq:
Q: I forgot my password?
A: Use the "Forgot Password" option on the sign-in screen to reset your password via your phone number.

Q: How do I add a child?
A: Go to the "Children" tab and tap the add button. Enter the child's information and select their school.

Q: How do I enable biometric login?
A: Go to Settings > Security and enable "Biometric Login". You will need to confirm your identity and enter your password.
about.helpContact:
If you can't find the answer to your question, contact our support team:

📧 Email: support@edufrais.com
📞 Phone: +242 06 000 00 00
🕐 Hours: Monday - Friday, 8am - 6pm
